case_title: YMA MUNOZ VS. ROGER D MILES

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-06-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF YMA MUNOZ. DEFENDANT ROGER D. MILES DID NOT APPEAR. PROOF OF SERVICES WAS FOUND TO BE DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,600.00 FILED BY MUNOZ, YMA AS TO DEFENDANT MILES, ROGER D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUNOZ, YMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILES, ROGER D $1,452.50 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,517.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED JAN-08-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MILES, ROGER D

FEE FOR SERVICE FOR CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNOZ, YMA AS TO DEFENDANT MILES, ROGER D
